report.indication: Palpable lump in right breast at 10 o'clock.
report.technique: Standard 4-view digital mammography with spot compression of the right breast.
report.comparison: Mammogram from prior year, no prior lesions.
report.findings: Right breast: 12 mm spiculated mass at 10 o'clock, 5 cm from the nipple. Left breast: no suspicious lesion.
report.impression:
1. Left breast spiculated mass, suspicious for malignancy. BI-RADS 4B.
2. Recommend ultrasound-guided biopsy of left breast lesion.
